---
title: "Essays"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    title-block-banner: false
    title-block: false
---

::: {.landing-page .essays-landing-page}
::: {.essays-hero}
::: {.container .py-5}
::: {.row .align-items-end}
::: {.col-lg-8}

::: {.essays-kicker}
Thinking Across Scales
:::

# Essays

::: {.essays-tagline}
Ideas that emerged from journeys, research, and life.
:::

:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.essays-intro .py-5 .py-lg-6}
::: {.container}
::: {.row .g-5 .align-items-center}
::: {.col-lg-7}

::: {.essays-lead}
The landscapes taught me to observe.  
The essays taught me to connect.
:::

::: {.essays-body}
What begins in a place often travels into a system. These essays trace that movement—from field observation to ecological thinking, from one scale to another, and from one question to a wider pattern.
:::

:::

::: {.col-lg-5}
::: {.essays-diagram aria-hidden="true"}
::: {.essays-diagram-core}
:::
::: {.essays-diagram-ring .ring-one}
:::
::: {.essays-diagram-ring .ring-two}
:::
::: {.essays-diagram-ring .ring-three}
:::
::: {.essays-diagram-connector .connector-a}
:::
::: {.essays-diagram-connector .connector-b}
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.essays-featured .py-5 .py-lg-6}
::: {.container}
::: {.row .align-items-end .mb-4}
::: {.col-lg-8}

::: {.essays-section-label}
Featured Essays
:::

## Recent notes from the field { .h1 .mb-0 }

:::
:::

::: {.essays-editorial-grid}

::: {.essay-feature-main}
::: {.essay-feature .essay-feature-primary}
::: {.essay-feature-image .image-one}
:::
::: {.essay-feature-copy}

::: {.essay-card-category}
Systems
:::

### Thinking Across Scales

How attention shifts when a landscape is read as a living network of relations rather than a fixed backdrop.

[Read Essay →](thinking-across-scales.qmd){.essay-card-link}

:::
:::
:::

::: {.essay-feature-rail}

::: {.essay-feature .essay-feature-secondary}
::: {.essay-feature-image .image-two}
:::
::: {.essay-feature-copy}

::: {.essay-card-category}
Observation
:::

### Seeing Across Scales

A reflection on perception, pattern, and the way landscapes reveal structure over time.

[Read Essay →](seeing-across-scales.qmd){.essay-card-link}

:::
:::

::: {.essay-feature .essay-feature-tertiary}
::: {.essay-feature-copy}

::: {.essay-card-category}
Movement
:::

### Spinning Across Scales

An exploration of movement, recursion, and the forms of thinking that loop back on themselves.

[Read Essay →](spinning-across-scales.qmd){.essay-card-link}

:::
:::

::: {.essay-feature-rule}
:::

::: {.essay-feature-image .image-three}
:::


:::
:::
:::

::: {.essays-footer .py-5}
::: {.container}
::: {.essays-footer-callout}

::: {.essays-footer-illustration aria-hidden="true"}
:::

:::
::: {.essays-section-label}
Still growing
:::

## More essays are growing. { .h3 .mb-3 }

::: {.mb-0}
Each new piece extends the work of looking closely, connecting widely, and following the patterns that emerge.
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::
